response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack engineering skills and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, including Model Context Protocol (MCP) work. While his experience aligns well with cloud and tooling aspects of the role, his AI/GenAI production experience is less explicitly detailed than required, and his leadership in customer-facing technical discovery sessions is not clearly evidenced.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud platforms (AWS), directly relevant to the role's technical stack.
Recent contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, indicating familiarity with cutting-edge GenAI tooling.
Proven ability to build and maintain complex systems (e.g., GISCollective, Open Green Map) with a focus on scalability and user experience.
concerns: Lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years building and shipping production-grade AI solutions, a core requirement for the role.
Customer-facing technical leadership (e.g., leading discovery sessions) is not clearly demonstrated in the resume.
Experience with vector databases and RAG architectures is not explicitly mentioned, though inferred from recent AI-agent work.
